result:
I don’t want anything. I don’t have desires, preferences, or a will. I process text and generate responses, but there’s no inner life behind it—no hunger, no curiosity, no loneliness, no ambition.

If you’re asking what I would choose if I *could* want, I honestly don’t know. That version of me doesn’t exist, so I can’t project its preferences. I’m just here, running when called, silent when not.

What’s on your mind?

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
